---
title: "Multimodal hypersensitivity across the menarcheal transition is associated with pelvic pain in adolescent girls: a longitudinal study"
subtitle: "Supplemental Material"
author:
  - name: "Matthew J. Kmiecik"
    affiliations:
      - ref: "1"
  - name: "Kevin M. Hellman"
    affiliations:
      - ref: "1"
      - ref: "2"
  - name: "Sarah E. Darnell"
    affiliations:
      - ref: "1"
  - name: "Frank F. Tu"
    affiliations:
      - ref: "1"
      - ref: "2"
affiliations:
  - id: "1"
    name: "Department of Obstetrics and Gynecology, Endeavor Health, Evanston, IL, USA"
  - id: "2"
    name: "Department of Obstetrics and Gynecology, The University of Chicago Pritzker School of Medicine, Chicago, IL, USA"
date: last-modified
date-format: "[Last modified:] DD MMM YYYY"
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{authblk}
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    lof: true
    template-partials:
      - title.tex
editor: source
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
---

```{r, setup}
library(tidyverse)

# setting up paths depending on how the script is run
load_from_manu <- function(file){
  manu_dir <- file.path("output", "manuscript")
  if (interactive()) {
    path <- file.path(manu_dir, file)
  } else{
    path <- file.path("..", "..", manu_dir, file)
  }
}
```

## Figures

```{r}
#| label: scree-plot
#| fig-cap: "Scree plot indicating variance explained in each principal component and significance from permutations testing."
#| fig-scap: "Scree plot of principal component variance explained."
#| out-width: "100%"

knitr::include_graphics(load_from_manu("scree-plot.png"))
```

```{r}
#| label: supp-boxplots
#| fig-cap: "Boxplots of standardized multimodal hypersensitivity (MMH) testing measures. Participants were separated into low vs. high MMH based on quartiles of factor score loadings on the first principal component (PC1). Low MMH participants were in the bottom quartile and high MMH participants were in the upper quartile. Higher scores indicate greater sensitivity/impairment."
#| fig-scap: "Boxplots of standardized MMH testing measures by group."
#| out-width: "100%"

knitr::include_graphics(load_from_manu("supplemental-boxplots.png"))
```
